items.title: [负面] 游戏是好游戏，当初是被游戏的美工和题材吸引进来的，真的喜欢。但是策划是真的不知天地为何物了，也是吉堡...
items.summary: 游戏是好游戏，当初是被游戏的美工和题材吸引进来的，真的喜欢。但是策划是真的不知天地为何物了，也是吉堡长脑子里了，用女角色做成✈杯这种事情也是想的出来，做点亚克力吧唧什么的很难以接受吗？

items.title: [负面] If your game begins with an EULA you want to make ...
items.summary:
If your game begins with an EULA you want to make an effort to have a version of it in the language of the person you want clicking on that whatever the unknown squiggle version of accept is button.
Without this basic accessibility I certainly do not recommend the potential legal ramifications of this game.

items.title: [正面] if you can get past the  AI translator minor mista...
items.summary: if you can get past the  AI translator minor mistakes I'd say this is a enjoyable deck building rogue like gacha game (kinda like slay the spire but anime (cthulhu inspired)
